author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Revised approach: The cc crate reads CFLAGS from the process environment. A downstream build.rs cannot inject env vars into upstream -sys crate builds. The correct fix is: (1) Create a compat header at a known project path, (2) Add .cargo/config.toml with [env] CFLAGS for Windows targets pointing to that header, (3) Document for CI. The header declares 'extern int signgam;' only on _WIN32.
